org_constraint: The response must contain exactly 10 sentences, with each paragraph containing at least 3 sentences.
new_constraint: The response must contain four paragraphs.

Planning a birthday party for a five year old requires fun activities that engage their energy. You should start by choosing themes like animals or superheroes to decorate the venue nicely. Balloons and streamers will make the room look festive for all the guests.

Snacks play a huge role in keeping young children happy throughout the celebration time. Finger foods such as fruit cups and mini pizzas work well for little hands to eat. Juices and milk options must always be available on the serving tray nearby.

To begin the games, hide a treasure map around the backyard for everyone to follow. A piñata filled with candy is a classic tradition that excites children during the party.

Parents can help clean up the mess after the main event concludes for the day. Make sure everyone gets a gift bag before the final goodbye.<|im_end|>

final_answer:
Planning a birthday party for a five year old requires fun activities that engage their energy. You should start by choosing themes like animals or superheroes to decorate the venue nicely. Balloons and streamers will make the room look festive for all the guests.

Snacks play a huge role in keeping young children happy throughout the celebration time. Finger foods such as fruit cups and mini pizzas work well for little hands to eat. Juices and milk options must always be available on the serving tray nearby.

To begin the games, hide a treasure map around the backyard for everyone to follow. A piñata filled with candy is a classic tradition that excites children during the party.

Parents can help clean up the mess after the main event concludes for the day. Make sure everyone gets a gift bag before the final goodbye.<|im_end|>
